name: MultiMessageCopy
changelog: v5.5.0 adds native Discord/Vencord update and export progress modals, fixes light/dark/custom theme readability, adds in-plugin update detection with a safe visible PowerShell updater, improves large chat exports with progress phases and better performance, adds searchable/filterable HTML exports, adds multiple copy formats, improves installed-version tracking, backups, updater safety, and cleans README/debug comments.
